overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a neon-lit night market with red lanterns and food stalls, transitioning to a rain-slicked city street with digital billboards and vending machines. The atmosphere is dense with cyberpunk aesthetic featuring purple, red, and teal neon lighting reflecting off wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market alley with burning barrel and graffiti

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow covered alley, passing a burning trash barrel on the left and food stalls on the right

entered.detail: metal barrel with open fire emitting orange glow and smoke against the wall
concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint and street art
illuminated food service counter with digital menus and warm lighting
large structural column supporting the overhead concrete structure
horizontal purple neon tube light mounted on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow covered alleyway of a night market. A burning trash barrel provides warm orange light against the left wall covered in graffiti, while food vendor stalls line the right side with digital menus glowing. The concrete ceiling features purple neon strips, and the wet floor reflects the mixed lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered food market with hanging red lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking through the central market area, observing food stalls and vendors under hanging red lanterns

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing behind the service counter preparing items

entered.detail: numerous traditional red paper lanterns hanging in rows from the ceiling
long serving counter with stools and illuminated display cases
large screen displaying food items and prices in neon text
large screen showing animated cherry blossom trees with pink petals

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions deeper into the covered market, characterized by dozens of red paper lanterns hanging overhead creating a canopy of warm light. Food service counters line the right side with vendors preparing food, while digital displays show animated cherry blossoms. The crowd density increases with pedestrians browsing the stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with vending machines and digital billboards

events.description: exits covered market into open city street with vending machines and large digital billboards
turns left onto the main sidewalk leaving the market area

agents.ego_description: turning left out of the market and walking along the wet city street past vending machines

entered.detail: teal-colored automated vending machine with illuminated product display
black automated dispenser with warning symbols and digital interface
tall digital screen displaying animated advertisements on building facade
industrial metal grate wall with horizontal slats
pile of blue and black trash bags stacked against the fence

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered market, the scene opens onto a wet asphalt street lined with vending machines and massive digital billboards. The camera turns left past a blue and black vending machine pair, walking alongside a metal ventilation fence with garbage bags. The environment shifts from enclosed market to open urban street with reflective wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with crosswalk and towering digital advertisements

events.description: crossing the wide street at yellow striped crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking across the yellow-striped crosswalk at a major intersection surrounded by tall buildings and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with dark umbrella crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes and green WALK text
massive vertical digital billboard on skyscraper showing animated content
suspended traffic signal showing red light above the intersection
elevated walkway connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide urban intersection dominated by towering buildings covered in massive digital advertisements. The camera approaches and crosses a yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk, joining other pedestrians including one carrying an umbrella. Overhead traffic lights and pedestrian bridges span the street, while neon storefronts line the right side and colossal digital screens illuminate the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that begins in a claustrophobic, neon-lit night market and gradually opens into a sprawling, rain-slicked urban intersection. It begins in a narrow covered alleyway where a burning trash barrel and purple neon strips cast reflections across a wet concrete floor. As the camera moves deeper into the market, the enclosed space transforms into a canopy of glowing red paper lanterns and animated digital displays amidst a growing crowd of pedestrians. The scene then shifts as the camera exits the covered stalls and emerges onto a wet asphalt street, passing blue and black vending machines and metal fences. Finally, the environment expands into a wide city intersection dominated by towering buildings and colossal digital advertisements, crossing a yellow-striped pedestrian walk under the glow of overhead traffic lights and neon storefronts.
